text:
Hostages × Insignificant Bugs × Communicated Emotions (人質×虫けら×伝わった思い, Hitojichi × Mushikera × Tsutawatta Omoi) is the 66th episode of the original Hunter × Hunter anime and the 4 th episode of the Yorknew City OVA series. It was released on DVD on February 20 th , 2002.

Overview

Killua swaps with Kurapika just in time and Gon and Killua are captured by the Phantom Troupe. The Spiders kill Squala and take his memories of Kurapika. Meanwhile, Gon's group ends up at the hotel where Leorio and Melody have set up a plan.

Synopsis

Chrollo, Machi, and Shizuku walk back towards where Gon's group has hidden. Gon, seeing Kurapika angry and about to launch into a fight, and not wanting his friend to reveal himself to the Spiders, jumps out of hiding before Kurapika can do anything and admits to being the one following the Spiders, begging for their forgiveness. Machi tells Chrollo that this was the boy who Nobunaga wanted to have join the Spiders, before asking Gon where his friend is; Killua then reveals himself to the Spiders as well. Machi questions why the boys are following them since the Mafia Community removed the bounty on the Spiders' heads, and the boys claim they didn't know that. Machi asks Chrollo what to do, and he instructs her to bind the boys to keep them prisoner in case Machi's intuition was correct, and the boys are connected to the Chain User.

Chrollo calls Phinks and tells him and his squad to meet them at the Hotel Beitacle. As they walk off toward the hotel, Melody and Kurapika tail them from afar. Melody scolds Kurapika for letting his anger get the better of him, blaming Kurapika for why Gon and Killua are currently at risk. Kurapika calms down, admits that Melody is right, and does his best to remain undetectable to the Spiders as they follow them.

Squala continues driving away in his car with the Scarlet Eyes in the back, unaware that the eyes are being tracked. Kortopi, Nobunaga, and Pakunoda can start catching up to Squala's car as Squala gets stuck in traffic and has to slow down. Leorio, trying to drive to the hotel, also keeps getting caught in traffic. Kortopi can sense which car has the eyes in it, and Nobunaga sprints towards it, hoping to find the Chain User there. One of Squala's dogs notices the incoming Troupe member, and Squala rushes to get out of the traffic, hitting several other cars in the process. Nobunaga still manages to catch up with Squala's car anyway and drives his sword through the roof of the car, narrowly avoiding Squala's head, and Squala is forced to stop the car. Squala's cell phone rings in the back seat as Kurapika keeps trying to call him.

Nobunaga, Kortopi, and Pakunoda surround the car and are disappointed to see it is not the Chain User inside. Squala is ordered to get out of the car, and he complies. Having a feeling that he will die tonight, Squala lets his dogs out of the car and allows them to run off without him. Pakunoda holds Squala at gunpoint and orders him to tell them where the Chain User is, but Squala pretends not to know him or where he is. Pakunoda knows he is lying and threatens Eliza to get him to talk. Squala becomes enraged and starts to lash out at her, but is swiftly killed by Nobunaga, who had ordered Squala not to move. Having learned a lot from Squala about the Chain User, Pakunoda offers to use her ability to shoot the memories into Nobunaga and Kortopi's minds with her gun. Although Nobunaga is initially scared, they trust Pakunoda enough to let her do it. Although Squala's memories focus a lot on Eliza, they also contain the identity of the Chain user and reveal what happened to Uvogin. After learning Kurapika's identity, Nobunaga is surprised that he has a beautiful face, but also swears to enact a terrible revenge on him.

Pakunoda tells the others about Kurapika's identity over the phone. Gon and Killua overhear this conversation and try to plan in their heads about what to do. Both independently worry about how their plan will go since they never got to iron out many of the details with Kurapika, Leorio, or Melody. Killua desperately tries to think of a way to signal to the others. Chrollo's group arrives at the hotel lobby, and Killua can't find an opening to move since the Spiders haven't let their guard down at all. Killua whispers under his breath, hoping that Melody will be able to hear him.

Leorio, who has been sitting nearby in the lobby, starts yelling on his phone to cause a distraction. While Leorio feigns scolding a colleague over the phone, Killua and Gon can pick up on the secret message in his words about what the plan will be; at seven o'clock, they will need to cause a blackout to distract the Spiders.
